'''kasacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squalenoylation|squalenoylation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squalenoylation|squalenoylation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kasacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæsæchæth|kæsæchæth]] || [[word:kæsæchæj|kæsæchæj]] || [[word:kæsæchæsh|kæsæchæsh]] || [[word:kæsæchæ|kæsæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kasasachath|kasasachath]] || [[word:kasasachaj|kasasachaj]] || [[word:kasasachash|kasasachash]] || [[word:kasasacha|kasasacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kasachath|kasachath]] || [[word:kasachaj|kasachaj]] || [[word:kasachash|kasachash]] || [[word:kasacha|kasacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kasafchath|kasafchath]] || [[word:kasafchaj|kasafchaj]] || [[word:kasafchash|kasafchash]] || [[word:kasafchaf|kasafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kasachatha|kasachatha]] || [[word:kasachaja|kasachaja]] || [[word:kasachasha|kasachasha]] || [[word:kasachaka|kasachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kasachath|kasachath]] || [[word:kasachaj|kasachaj]] || [[word:kasachash|kasachash]] || [[word:kasacha|kasacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kasachathal|kasachathal]] || [[word:kasachajal|kasachajal]] || [[word:kasachashal|kasachashal]] || [[word:kasachakal|kasachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kasachathatha|kasachathatha]] || [[word:kasachajaja|kasachajaja]] || [[word:kasachashasha|kasachashasha]] || [[word:kasachaka|kasachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kasachathan|kasachathan]] || [[word:kasachajan|kasachajan]] || [[word:kasachashan|kasachashan]] || [[word:kasachakan|kasachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kasachathaoro|kasachathaoro]] || [[word:kasachajaoro|kasachajaoro]] || [[word:kasachashaoro|kasachashaoro]] || [[word:kasachakaoro|kasachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
